name: Find the repeating and missing number
category: Solve Problems on Arrays [Easy -> Medium -> Hard]
statement:
Given an integer array nums of size n containing values from [1, n] and each value appears exactly once in the array, except for A, which appears twice and B which is missing.


Return the values A and B, as an array of size 2, where A appears in the 0-th index and B in the 1st index.


Note: You are not allowed to modify the original array.
constraints:
• n == nums.length
  • 1 <= n <= 105
  • n - 2 elements in nums appear exactly once and are valued between [1, n].
  • 1 element in nums appears twice, and is valued between [1, n].

examples.explanation: 1 appears two times in the array and 2 is missing from nums
7 appears two times in the array and 4 is missing from nums.
